intro: Between 12 and 26 April 2026, ZCyberNews published 17 articles on critical-infrastructure security, with APT33, CyberAv3ngers, and Lotus Wiper among the most frequently observed threat actors. The coverage highlighted CVE-2026-24032, a vulnerability rated 7.3 on the CVSS scale, and focused on sectors including energy, utilities, manufacturing, and water across the United States, Europe, North America, the Asia-Pacific region, and globally. The reporting comprised nine high-severity incidents, three critical, three informational, and one medium.
